# How to send BULK emails in WordPress

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-06-21 13:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 865

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Do you want to send bulk emails to registered website users?

Sending emails to registered users, like members, students, or
customers, can help you build long-lasting relationships with
them.

While I always recommend using an email marketing service, I get
it… sometimes you just need to send a quick announcement without
the complexity or cost.

I asked my team to update our detailed guide on sending emails to
all registered users WITHOUT an email marketing service. Go check
it out here 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..zZ9yjRiqk4C7UZkffsQvcFtKxMpMkcaF-4NJpiLl5CM )
.

Ready to Level Up Your Email Marketing?
---------------------------------------

Now, if you've been using the method above and are seeing good
results, it might be time to consider a proper email marketing
service.

Professional email services give you advanced automation, better
email deliverability rates, and more.

But the challenge is choosing the right one. Read our best email
marketing services 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.8F9TgFFP5lKWVA6pLqLCNo0WvwyKsngoRWVsLp38v1I )
 for help.

Speaking of Growing Your Business...
------------------------------------

A great email strategy only works if people actually want to sign
up for your list. And that starts with a website that builds
trust from the first click.

presence.

Have a great rest of your week :)

Cheers,

Syed Balkhi
